note: seq=68 (throughput intake fix): use exact count(*) FROM atlas.business for intake (reltuples lagged until ANALYZE so intake/min showed 0 despite the generic promoter adding rows). Re-fetch + sha-verify + restart atlas-throughput so intake/min reflects the real climb. Read-only.

steps.note: seq=68: throughput intake -> exact count(*) so intake/min climbs truthfully.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_throughput.py':'297f46729529de9256289bc75206b20385918c6ea732da201a59ab20d5ddb829'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
